name: Offline POS Manual Synchronisation
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can manually trigger synchronization for Offline POS terminals in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": ", ensuring transaction data uploads to the cloud database and product/pricing updates download to terminals. This helps optimize your retail operations by providing control over synchronization timing, enabling verification that offline transactions uploaded correctly, and ensuring terminals have current product and pricing information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Offline POS has been designed as an emergency POS system. This feature allows your business to continue serving customers in the event that your internet connection is interrupted or there is an issue with access to Retail Express."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using Retail Express you can manually prompt a resync of the Offline POS system. This will be useful in times where synchronisations were unable to be completed, or there's a need to re-synchronise transactions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Confirm Offline POS is installed"}], "data-id": "confirm-offline-pos-is-installed"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before you begin, you will need to confirm that Offline POS has been installed. If not, you should"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Access the POS Homepage (where users will land after logging into a Register initially and return to after each sale has been processed)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the upper right-hand corner of the POS Homepage, if Offline POS is installed, an Offline POS icon will be visible alongside a Trade Offline button (hover over the icon to see the sync status)"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVkGEAU.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVkGEAU.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip1 (65).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Offline POS icon will be coloured depending on the "}, {"text": "status"}, {"text": " e.g. Green means the synchronisation was last performed less than one hour ago."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Manually Prompt a Synchronisation"}], "data-id": "manually-prompt-a-synchronisation"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Synchronisations can be prompted from either Back Office or POS, useful where synchronisations were unable to be completed or there's a need to re-synchronise transactions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Back Office"}], "data-id": "back-office"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To prompt a synchronisation:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Reports > External Services > Offline POS Servers", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A list of the Offline POS Servers for your database will be displayed"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Resync button", "bold": true}, {"text": " will appear in the new Resync 2023-07-08T223514.669.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Repeat for the "}, {"text": "Offline POS Sync Service ", "bold": true}, {"text": "and "}, {"text": "Offline POS Update Service", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once all services has been restarted close the Services app"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open "}, {"text": "POS", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Refresh", "bold": true}, {"text": " the browser by clicking the Refresh button or pressing F5 on the keyboard"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "After an hour confirm if the Sync Status has been updated and if the status icon colour has changed"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVkfEAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppVkfEAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip1 (67).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
